//: MCP-NixOS server — gives Claude (claude-code / opcode / Claude Desktop) accurate, live NixOS package + option data (130K+ pkgs, 23K+ options, 4K+ home-manager, version history). No API key. Drop this into your Claude MCP config on the NixOS box.
//usage: claude-code: `claude mcp add nixos -- nix run github:utensils/mcp-nixos --`   OR paste the mcpServers block into ~/.config/claude/claude_desktop_config.json (opcode/Claude Desktop).
